title: Canonical Format: HTML5 Banner
description: Interactive HTML5 banner delivered as a zip archive. Slot: `html5_bundle` (zip asset). Tracking model: MRAID + IAB Open Measurement (OM-SDK) + click-tag macro substitution + backup image fallback. Receivers unpack the zip, validate internal structure, and serve from CDN. Distinct from `image` (static, non-interactive) and `display_tag` (third-party served). The zip's entry point is typically `index.html`; click handling uses `clickTag` (or `clickTAG`) macro substitution.

slots.description: Default slots for html5 canonical. Buyer ships a zip bundle plus optional backup image (required when `backup_image_required: true`) and clickthrough URL. The zip's entry point is typically `index.html`; click handling uses the `clickTag` (or `clickTAG`) macro substituted by the seller at serve time.

max_initial_load_kb.description: Maximum initial-load file size (zip + above-the-fold assets) in kilobytes. IAB display standards: 200 KB for fixed sizes, 100 KB for mobile.

max_polite_load_kb.description: Maximum polite-load file size after host-initiated subload, in kilobytes. IAB display standards: 500 KB for fixed sizes.

host_initiated_subload.description: Whether the host page must initiate the polite-load phase. IAB-compliant banners require true.

max_animation_duration_ms.description: Maximum total animation duration in milliseconds. IAB standard: 30000 (30 seconds).

max_cpu_load_percent.description: Maximum CPU load percentage during render.

mraid_required.description: Whether MRAID compatibility is required (mobile in-app).

mraid_version.description: Required MRAID version when mraid_required is true.

om_sdk_required.description: Whether IAB Open Measurement SDK integration is required.

clicktag_macro.description: Name of the click-tag macro the bundle must use.

backup_image_required.description: Whether a backup image must accompany the zip for non-HTML5 environments.

backup_image_max_size_kb.description: Maximum backup image file size in kilobytes.
